ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., ResNet, YOLO) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation metric used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing model hyperparameters */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model in hours */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used for the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_evaluation_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "pose" REAL /* Pose evaluation metric */,
  "background" REAL /* Background evaluation metric */,
  "pattern" REAL /* Pattern evaluation metric */,
  "color" REAL /* Color evaluation metric */,
  "smaller" REAL /* Smaller evaluation metric */,
  "shape" REAL /* Shape evaluation metric */,
  "partial_view" REAL /* Partial view evaluation metric */,
  "subcategory" REAL /* Subcategory evaluation metric */,
  "texture" REAL /* Texture evaluation metric */,
  "larger" REAL /* Larger evaluation metric */,
  "darker" REAL /* Darker evaluation metric */,
  "object_blocking" REAL /* Object blocking evaluation metric */,
  "person_blocking" REAL /* Person blocking evaluation metric */,
  "style" REAL /* Style evaluation metric */,
  "brighter" REAL /* Brighter evaluation metric */,
  "multiple_objects" REAL /* Multiple objects evaluation metric */,
  "worst_factor" REAL /* Worst factor evaluation metric */,
  "average" REAL /* Average evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "confidence_threshold" REAL /* Confidence threshold used for evaluation */,
  "iou_threshold" REAL /* IoU threshold used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "num_images" INTEGER /* Number of images in the dataset */,
  "categories" TEXT /* JSON array of object categories in the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or origin of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation metric */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Mathematical formula or definition of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "performance_change" TEXT /* Performance change compared to the previous version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "change_summary" TEXT /* Summary of changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model or dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
